audit_metadata.status_statement: P1B remains SHADOW ONLY. This audit documents the current implementation and its identity implications only. No signals have been tested, no pipeline changes have been made, and no decision-time variants have been frozen.

implementation_footprint.tracker_note: Zero signals — season window is June-September; April is outside window

temperature_identity.fetch_timing: live at script run time (11:20 AM ET for cron)
temperature_identity.forecast_target: game's first-pitch local hour on today's ET date
temperature_identity.parity_monitor_note: No mechanism compares forecast_temp_f to realized first-pitch temperature. weather_timestamp field records fetch time only.
temperature_identity.dt_compatibility: NOT_COMPATIBLE — each DT window would fetch a different forecast; no historical DT-labeled temperature exists in panel
temperature_identity.dome_handling: is_dome=True games are excluded before temperature check

price_gate_identity.primary_source: mlb_sim/data/line_snapshots_2026.json — latest snapshot by snapshot_time for target date

price_at_1120_am_et_run.note: 5PM and CLOSING snapshots at 17:00 UTC are not yet available at 15:20 UTC cron run

price_gate_identity.price_alignment_concern: Research validation price source is unverified — if original research used closing prices, live deployment using 2AM prices creates a definition mismatch

dt_1200.snapshot_available: 2AM (same as 11:20 AM run unless intraday snapshot added)

object_identity_implications.temperature_reason: No DT-labeled historical temperature values exist. Each DT window would use a different forecast fetch time, making them semantically distinct objects.
object_identity_implications.price_reason: DT0700/DT1000/DT1200 all see the same 2AM snapshot in current infrastructure. A DT-close variant using 5PM/CLOSING would be a new object. Price alignment with original research is unverified.
object_identity_implications.f5_ratio_dt_compatible: LIKELY — F5 canonical line does not change intraday, but no per-window snapshots exist

items: temperature_dt_semantics: No DT-labeled temperature snapshots; live fetch at run time only
price_source_alignment: Original research price source (2AM vs closing) unverified against live deployment
temperature_parity_monitor: No forecast vs realized comparison mechanism
f5_line_dt_snapshots: Only one canonical row per game; no per-DT F5 line history
panel_temperature_absence: intraday_decision_panel_v1 has no temperature column; cannot backtest temperature gate against panel

blockers: Temperature has no DT-labeled historical values in the decision panel
Price source alignment between research validation and live deployment is unverified
No parity monitor exists for forecast vs realized temperature
F5 line DT snapshots not available in panel
pre_conditions_required: Confirm which price snapshot was used in original P1B research validation
Enrich intraday_decision_panel_v1 with temperature at each DT window or document single-fetch policy
Document DT variant price policy (same 2AM for all windows vs per-window capture)
Decide whether parity monitor is required before freeze
